Pinnal that's stuck
That's really satisfying
Car detailing level 3000

Satisfying thatching

item.title: Velma Dinkley Cosplay
item.description: Jinkies! It's me as Velma Dinkley! I love doing cosplays that fans request, and this had been one I've been asked to redo for years. It feels good to fit the outfit even better now :P

item.title: True Superheroes
item.description: Lest we forget what we almost lost. “Here are the women, Senate aides, who had the presence of mind and courage to protect, keep safe, and transport the electoral votes before fleeing the Senate, which was under siege by domestic terrorists. There will always be villains. There will always be heroes.” @glenndoyle
item.dc:creator: 103Brewer

item.title: The 104th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 7 - Misc Sound dotGifs
item.description:
WI-FI CHECK!!!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
If anyone has more of these, please put them in the comments!
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #Sound_On #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. III Vol 61 https://imgur.com/gallery/VNlNlNX - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. IV Vol 62 https://imgur.com/gallery/5BAeeTJ - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. V Vol 63 https://imgur.com/gallery/SZlkuUY - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. VI Vol 64 https://imgur.com/gallery/KBtYW2X - Obvious Plant (and the like) Vol 65 https://imgur.com/gallery/4tggfcY - BEEEEEEEEEESSSSS!!! Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v. I Vol 90 https://imgur.com/gallery/nVppX8R - FROG EDITION v. II Vol 91 https://imgur.com/gallery/bQE1BJC - FROG EDITION v. W(ednesday) Vol 92 https://imgur.com/gallery/vTa4OfV - Water-Boi Edition v. I - Turts and Torts and Other Sorts Vol 93 https://imgur.com/gallery/NI7VUch Vol 94 https://imgur.com/gallery/Pig0xQs Vol 95 https://imgur.com/gallery/XulI771 Vol 96 https://imgur.com/gallery/L3gAJ2N Vol 97 https://imgur.com/gallery/JPUrl9G Vol 98 https://imgur.com/gallery/j5ZVE0E Vol 99 https://imgur.com/gallery/4rgiVNz Vol 100 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXDeofd Vol 101 https://imgur.com/gallery/XllhIAf - "SOUND ON! item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Co-parenting
item.description:
Pepa (orange) and Julietta are my foster cats. They gave birth about a week apart.
Pepa has 6 orange kittens and Julietta had 2- one orange and one black tabby.
All baby is their baby, tho.
They love both their mommy.
Julietta didn’t want to be a mom at first. Pepa took care of her two while she figured things out and now she’s doing great.
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: Cats do whatever they want
item.dc:creator: ObsessedWithAnimals

item.title: The dog from this comic, passed away
item.description: Wanna know something crazy? I’m not even a dog person and I’m crying from reading this. I’m a grown man and I’m crying my eyes out. It wasn’t even my dog! Lol. But I lost my bunny last year and it still hurts. These furry little friends of ours are lights in a cold, dark, and indifferent world. They come into our lives as suddenly as they leave, and we never really know how much we loved them until they’re gone. We think they depend on us, but the truth is we depend on them. So in memory of “Rambo”, and of my own little bunny rabbit “Fluffy G”, please give your pets a big ol hug tonight. They deserve it.
item.dc:creator: TheJokerXX

item.title: The man who saved a billion lives.
item.description: Norman Borlaug's tireless work breeding new wheat was a major factor in the green revolution. Before gene mapping, he tried and tested wheat plants to aim for drought and disease resistance. It is estimated that he saved around a billion people from starvation across developing nations.
item.dc:creator: Wordsmeannothing

item.title: I grew this crystal from scrap copper and vinegar. It took 7 months.
item.description:
When you wash old pennies with vinegar, the vinegar turns blue. This is because vinegar reacts with copper metal to form copper acetate. If you let the solution evaporate, black crystals will be left behind. These are copper acetate crystals.
It turns out you can grow much bigger copper acetate crystals. I prepared lots of copper acetate by dissolving scrap copper in white vinegar, and let the solution evaporate.
Seed crystals began to form after some time.
I chose a seed crystal and tied it to a fishing line.
After 7 months, this was the result.
I find it fascinating how the crystal has such smooth faces and sharp edges, even though it was not cut or polished in any way. If you guys are interested, you can find my full procedure on growing it here: https://crystalverse.com/copper-acetate-crystals/
item.dc:creator: crystalchase21

item.title: The oldest door is still in use in Rome. Cast in bronze for emperor Hadrian' about 115 AD.
